apps.name: DeepAlpha Research Terminal
apps.description: Next-gen stock research terminal with transformer-based fundamental analysis. Tri-signal engine produces BUY/SELL/HOLD for stocks, crypto, and ETFs independently. RSS feed aggregation from 50+ financial sources with AI summarization. RBAC with team-level strategy sharing, complete audit trail, and headless CMS for publishing research notes.

apps.name: CryptoSentinel AI Desk
apps.description: Crypto-focused deep analysis dashboard with on-chain metrics, whale wallet tracking, and DeFi yield analysis. Produces accuracy-scored BUY/SELL/HOLD on top 200 tokens. RSS crypto news with sentiment scoring. RBAC admin/analyst/viewer roles with full audit log. CMS for publishing crypto market reports.

apps.name: ETFNavigator Intelligence
apps.description: ETF-specialist dashboard with factor exposure analysis, sector rotation model, and AI-driven allocation recommendations. Produces risk-adjusted BUY/SELL/HOLD per ETF with confidence intervals. RSS economic data feeds. RBAC portfolio manager roles. Audit-compliant logging. CMS for ETF strategy documentation.

apps.name: TriSignal Portfolio Hub
apps.description: Unified dashboard showing BUY/SELL/HOLD recommendations across stocks, crypto, AND ETFs in one view. Deep AI analysis combines technical, fundamental, and sentiment signals. RSS from Bloomberg, CoinDesk, ETF.com aggregated. RBAC with audit trail. Next-gen CMS for portfolio commentary and client-facing reports.

apps.name: AlphaResearch AI Lab
apps.description: Institutional-grade research platform with AI-powered deep dives into company fundamentals. Generates analyst-quality research reports with BUY/SELL targets and price forecasts. RSS earnings calendar and SEC filing feeds. RBAC research team hierarchy. Full audit trail. CMS for publishing internal research.

apps.name: QuantFlow Trading Console
apps.description: Quantitative trading console with backtesting, live signal generation, and multi-asset recommendation engine. AI produces accuracy-rated calls across equities, crypto, and ETF baskets. RSS quant research feeds. RBAC for strategy teams. Every backtest and live signal audited. CMS for strategy documentation.

apps.name: RSSTrader Market Wire
apps.description: RSS-first trading intelligence platform. Aggregates 100+ financial RSS feeds with AI categorization, urgency scoring, and automatic stock/crypto/ETF impact analysis. Produces trade recommendations triggered by breaking news. RBAC newsroom roles. Audit trail on all AI-generated recs. CMS editorial dashboard.

apps.name: DeepCrypto Whale Scanner
apps.description: Deep crypto intelligence platform tracking whale movements, exchange flows, and smart money patterns. AI generates accuracy-scored BUY/SELL signals for tokens and crypto ETFs. RSS DeFi protocol feeds. RBAC trading desk roles. Complete whale-alert audit log. CMS for publishing on-chain research.

apps.name: MacroTrader AI Deck
apps.description: Macro-driven trading dashboard with Fed policy analysis, yield curve modeling, and cross-asset recommendations spanning equities, crypto, and bond ETFs. RSS central bank feeds with AI interpretation. RBAC macro strategy roles. Audit-compliant decision logging. CMS for macro outlook publications.

apps.name: StockPulse Accuracy Engine
apps.description: Accuracy-obsessed stock prediction platform. Tracks and publishes hit rates for every BUY/SELL/HOLD recommendation with transparent methodology. AI models compete on accuracy leaderboard. RSS market data feeds. RBAC analyst roles. Full prediction audit trail. CMS for publishing accuracy reports and methodology docs.

apps.name: FutureGen Portfolio CMS
apps.description: Future-generation CMS platform purpose-built for investment content. AI auto-generates market commentary, portfolio updates, and client newsletters from live data. Stocks, crypto, and ETF modules with recommendation widgets. RSS syndication engine. RBAC content workflow (draft/review/publish). Full audit trail.

apps.name: SmartETF Allocator Pro
apps.description: Professional ETF allocation dashboard with AI-driven portfolio construction. Produces risk-scored BUY/SELL/HOLD on 500+ ETFs across equity, bond, commodity, and crypto categories. RSS ETF launch and flow feeds. RBAC advisor/client hierarchy. MiFID-compliant audit logging. CMS for allocation strategy publishing.

apps.name: TradeAudit Compliance Hub
apps.description: Compliance-first trading dashboard with complete audit trail for every recommendation and execution. AI monitors for insider trading patterns, wash sales, and regulatory violations across stocks, crypto, and ETFs. RSS regulatory feed from SEC/CFTC/FINRA. RBAC compliance officer roles. CMS for compliance policy management.

apps.name: CryptoETF Bridge Analyzer
apps.description: Bridging crypto native and crypto ETF analysis. Compares spot crypto vs ETF premiums/discounts, tracks inflows, and produces BUY/SELL/HOLD for both asset types. RSS crypto regulatory feeds. RBAC institutional trading roles. Audit trail for all cross-market recs. CMS for publishing bridge analysis reports.

apps.name: AlphaStream Research Feed
apps.description: Real-time streaming research dashboard with continuous AI analysis. Live BUY/SELL/HOLD signals for stocks, crypto, and ETFs update as market data flows. 200+ RSS feed firehose with AI filtering. RBAC subscriber tiers. Streaming audit log. Headless CMS for research distribution and API syndication.
